name: TuyaDevice
description: Structure documentation for the Tuya Device resource returned by the Device Management API

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique device identifier assigned by Tuya platform

fields.name: name
fields.description: Friendly display name for the device

fields.name: local_key
fields.description: Encryption key for local LAN communication

fields.name: category
fields.description: Product category code (e.g., dj=bulb, kg=switch, wk=thermostat)

fields.name: sub
fields.description: True if device connects via a gateway (sub-device)

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current values of all device data points

fields.name: time_zone
fields.description: IANA time zone of device location

DataPoint.description: A single device data point representing current state

fields.name: code
fields.description: Data point identifier (e.g., switch_led, bright_value, colour_data_v2)

fields.name: value
fields.description: Current value, type varies: boolean, integer, string, or object
